payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, glossy finish showing vertical reflections and a small chip at the top-left; left and top edges are cropped and a light-colored floor or fabric is visible at the lower right — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden cabinet door edge-crop","long_description":"Partial view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, glossy finish showing vertical reflections and a small chip at the top-left; left and top edges are cropped and a light-colored floor or fabric is visible at the lower right — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","wooden","glossy finish","recessed panel","molded frame","left/top edge cropped","small chip top-left","vertical reflections","adjacent light textile/floor"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
